raw: {"perspective": "Product Strategist", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "atlas_swarm_daemon.py", "issue": "The self-check loop may create noise tasks if not properly calibrated, potentially overwhelming the system with unnecessary tasks.", "recommended_fix": "Implement a noise reduction mechanism, such as a task filtering system or a more sophisticated task creation algorithm."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "atlas_swarm_daemon.py", "issue": "The safe executors, although added with good intent, may have unintended blast radius concerns if not thoroughly tested.", "recommended_fix": "Conduct thorough testing of the safe executors to identify and mitigate any potential blast radius concerns."}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "atlas_swarm_daemon.py", "issue": "The removal of the prod health curl may lead to a monitoring gap, despite GH Actions already monitoring prod every 15min.", "recommended_fix": "Consider adding an additional monitoring mechanism to ensure prod health is adequately covered."}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: The self-check loop may create noise tasks if not properly calibrated, potentially overwhelming the system with unnecessary tasks.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement a noise reduction mechanism, such as a task filtering system or a more sophisticated task creation algorithm.

findings.issue: The safe executors, although added with good intent, may have unintended blast radius concerns if not thoroughly tested.
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct thorough testing of the safe executors to identify and mitigate any potential blast radius concerns.

findings.issue: The removal of the prod health curl may lead to a monitoring gap, despite GH Actions already monitoring prod every 15min.
findings.recommended_fix: Consider adding an additional monitoring mechanism to ensure prod health is adequately covered.
